summary: Tested all P1, P2, and Enhancement features: Live Price Updates, Notifications Panel, Calendar Integration, and Mobile Responsive design. All 13 features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Live Price Updates - 'Start Live' button activates 30-second auto-updates
Live Price Updates - Prices fluctuate realistically when live mode is active (2% max change with upward bias)
Live Price Updates - Status indicator shows 'Live updates active' with timestamp
Live Price Updates - Button changes to green 'Live • Xs ago' when active
Notifications Panel - Bell icon in sidebar header shows unread count badge (3 new)
Notifications Panel - Click bell opens slide-out panel with notification list
Notifications Panel - Has 4 tabs: All, Unread, Tasks, Meetings
Notifications Panel - Settings section with 6 toggles for notification types
Notifications Panel - Mark all read and Clear all buttons work
Calendar Integration - Each meeting card has 'Add to Calendar' dropdown
Calendar Integration - Dropdown shows Google Calendar, Outlook.com, Office 365, Apple Calendar (.ics), Download .ics
Calendar Integration - 'Export All (3)' button visible on Meetings tab
Calendar Integration - Calendar Integrations settings card shows Connect buttons for Google and Outlook
Calendar Integration - Apple Calendar shows 'Export Only' badge
Mobile Responsive - Client Portal displays correctly on mobile (390x844)
Mobile Responsive - Client Portal header is compact with logout/exit buttons
Mobile Responsive - Practice Management displays correctly on mobile
Mobile Responsive - Practice Management shows all 6 tabs on mobile
Mobile Responsive - KPI cards stack vertically on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested P1 (Live Price Updates, Mobile Responsive), P2 (Notifications Panel, Sidebar scroll), and Enhancement (Calendar Integration) features. All features working correctly. Live price updates use simulated fluctuations (MOCKED - not real market data). Notifications use mock data stored in localStorage (MOCKED). Calendar OAuth shows setup dialog but doesn't actually connect without API keys (MOCKED). Set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass compliance modal.

mocked_apis.Live Price Updates: MOCKED - Uses simulated price fluctuations (2% max change with slight upward bias), not real market data
mocked_apis.Notifications: MOCKED - Uses mock data stored in localStorage, not real notification service
mocked_apis.Calendar OAuth: MOCKED - Shows setup dialog but doesn't actually connect without API keys configured

Button changes to green 'Live • Xs ago' when active
Status shows 'Live updates active • Updates every 30 seconds • Last: timestamp'
Prices fluctuate realistically (CBA: $23,700 -> $23,978, BHP: $12,840 -> $12,600)
Toast notification appears on activation
Bell icon shows unread count badge (3 new)
Slide-out panel opens on click
4 tabs: All, Unread, Tasks, Meetings
5 notification types displayed (Task, Meeting, Market, Compliance, Invoice)
Settings section with 6 toggles
Mark all read and Clear all buttons
Add to Calendar dropdown on each meeting card
5 export options: Google Calendar, Outlook.com, Office 365, Apple Calendar (.ics), Download .ics
Export All button with count
Calendar Integrations settings card
Connect buttons for Google and Outlook
Export Only badge for Apple Calendar
Header compact and mobile-friendly
Logout and Exit Portal buttons visible
Key metrics in 2x2 grid
Tabs accessible
Content readable and scrollable
Header with title and Timer button
All 6 tabs visible
KPI cards stack vertically
Meetings and Tasks sections display properly
